agent_reasoning: I replaced the linear Ridge baseline with LightGBM to leverage native `predict_proba` probabilities and automatic feature interactions, upgraded numerical imputation to `KNNImputer`, and capped categorical cardinality via `OneHotEncoder(max_categories=...)` to prevent high-cardinality blow-up. I also switched the classification CV strategy to `StratifiedKFold` for more reliable ROC-AUC estimates and hardened the submission logic by explicitly capturing the test ID column before feature alignment.
